claimText: Lucknow witnessed one of the pivotal moments in Indian history: the first meeting of stalwarts Mahatma Gandhi, Jawaharlal Nehru and Mohd Ali Jinnah during the Indian National Congress session of 1916.
evidenceExcerpt: Lucknow witnessed one of the pivotal moments in Indian history: the first meeting of stalwarts Mahatma Gandhi, Jawaharlal Nehru and Mohd Ali Jinnah during the Indian National Congress session of 1916.
examUse: Could support a statement-based or institution-feature question.

claimText: The Lucknow Pact was signed and moderates and extremists came together through the efforts of Annie Besant during this session.
evidenceExcerpt: The Lucknow Pact was signed and moderates and extremists came together through the efforts of Annie Besant during this session.

claimText: "If the Congress was buried at Surat, it is reborn in Lucknow in the garden of Wajid Ali Shah." — Ambica Charan Majumdar, Congress President
